issue_summary: Fixed bug in SimilarityFactory initialization that prevented SolrCoreAware factories from functioning properly with managed schema features
javadoc_before: /** Sets the latest schema snapshot to be used by this core instance. */
javadoc_after: /** * Sets the latest schema snapshot to be used by this core instance. * If the specified replacementSchema uses a {@link SimilarityFactory} which is * {@link SolrCoreAware} then this method will {@link SolrCoreAware#inform} that factory about * this SolrCore prior to using the replacementSchema * @see #getLatestSchema */
